query: SELECT pt.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pt.dailyTargetQty, pt.baseUnitPoints FROM productivity_target_configs pt JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = pt.categoryId WHERE pt.active = 1 AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機' AND pc.brandName = 'Apple' AND pt.stationCode IN ('A1','A2','B','C','D','E') ORDER BY FIELD(pt.stationCode,'A1','A2','B','C','D','E'), pt.effectiveFrom DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT pt.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pt.dailyTargetQty, pt.baseUnitPoints FROM productivity_target_configs pt JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = pt.categoryId WHERE pt.active = 1 AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機' AND pc.brandName = 'Apple' AND pt.stationCode IN ('A1','A2','B','C','D','E') ORDER BY FIELD(pt.stationCode,'A1','A2','B','C','D','E'), pt.effectiveFrom DESC;
